# mena climate — Climate Frontiers

> A four-part sustainability series for the Gulf. Ras Al Khaimah, 2026.
> Co-presented by CEBC and Kai Kata.

## About
mena climate is the convening brand for the Climate Frontiers series — a 2026 programme of four in-person forums in Ras Al Khaimah, United Arab Emirates. The series traces the path from regulation to implementation across the Gulf's highest-impact sectors: law & science, the built environment, and industrial decarbonisation.

## Programme
- **Forum 01 — The compliance imperative** (Law & Science). UAE Federal Law No. 11 decarbonisation obligations, penalty tiers, and NDC alignment.
- **Forum 02 — State of the climate** (Law & Science). Where global and regional emissions stand today, and what the remaining carbon budget means for Gulf economies.
- **Forum 03 — Building circular** (Built Environment). Materials and models for a growing Ras Al Khaimah, set against the emirate's active development pipeline. Venue: RAK Ceramics HQ.
- **Forum 04 — Capturing carbon** (Industrial Decarbonisation). Scaling CCS for the Gulf — technical and commercial pathways, regional project pipeline, and transition financing. Venue: Compass Centre.

Series runs February–November 2026 in Ras Al Khaimah, UAE.

## Speakers (2026)
- Adrienne Doolan — Managing Director, CEBC MENA
- Dr. Mohamed Abu Zahra — Founder & Head of MEA, Global CCS Institute
- Gurmeet Kaur — Partner, Pinsent Masons · CEBC Board
- Racha Moukayed — Managing Director, Howden Broking
- Anna Griffin — Sustainability & Advocacy Director, Holcim UAE
- Arnaud Lager — Chief Executive Officer, Decahydron
- Eftal Efeçinar — Head of Partnerships, Coral
- Alissa King — General Counsel & Board Member, Positive Zero

## Co-presenters
- **CEBC (Clean Energy Business Council)** — MENA's leading non-profit voice for clean energy policy and private-sector action. https://cebc-mea.com
- **Kai Kata** — convening & content studio turning climate strategy into rooms that decide and deliver. https://kaikata.co

## Participation
- Capacity is intentionally small; reserved-seat only.
- Reserve at https://menaclimate.com/#register
- Calendar invite and venue details sent within two working days.

## Contact
- Email: hello@menaclimate.com
- Location: Ras Al Khaimah, United Arab Emirates
